---
title: "Kruskal–Wallis Test in R"
author: "Dr Lindokuhle Dlamini"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

## Download Dataset

<a href="data/Kruskal Wallis Test Data.xlsx" download>Download the dataset used in this lesson</a>

---
# Kruskal–Wallis Test

The **Kruskal–Wallis test** is the **non-parametric alternative to one-way ANOVA**.

---

# Load Packages

```r
library(readxl)
library(FSA)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

---

# Import Data

```r
Kruskal_Wallis_Test_Data <- read_excel("Kruskal Wallis Test Data.xlsx")

View(Kruskal_Wallis_Test_Data)

dataKruskal <- Kruskal_Wallis_Test_Data
```

---

# Perform Kruskal-Wallis Test

```r
kruskal.test(`Plant richness` ~ Sites, data = dataKruskal)
```

---

# Post Hoc Test (Dunn Test)

```r
dunnTest(`Plant richness` ~ Sites,
         data = dataKruskal,
         method = "bonferroni")
```

---
